cd ~

2021-01-01

Pilot

Hey! Its Sanketh.

This is my first post on my very own personal blog, where I put out my thoughts with code and words.

Honestly, I have had ideas for blog posts for a year now. I just was lazy never had the time to actually sit and get it done. But, here we are. Right place, right time.

Inspirations:

  • Eric Raymond’s blog: If you dont know ESR, what are you even doing here? Go and read his fantastic posts like how to ask smart questions and how to be a hacker. Read more about him here.

  • Riggraz’s blog: Well, I have just copied taken inspiration from his website. lol.
